code:
import io
import string

fn byte_or_zero(_ s: String, _ i: Int) -> Int
  match string.byte_at(s, i)
  when Some(x)
    x
  when None
    0
  end
end

fn next_sep(_ s: String, _ start: Int, _ tlen: Int) -> Int
  mut q = start
  mut found = false
  while q < tlen and not found
    if byte_or_zero(s, q) == 1
      found = true
    else
      q = q + 1
    end
  end
  q
end

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let input = io.read_to_end()
  let n = string.len(input)
  let sep = string.from_byte(1)

  mut tokens = ""
  mut i = 0
  mut cur_start = -1
  while i < n
    let b = byte_or_zero(input, i)
    if is_ws(b)
      if cur_start >= 0
        let tok = string.substring(input, cur_start, i)
        tokens = "#{tokens}#{tok}#{sep}"
        cur_start = -1
      end
    else
      if cur_start < 0
        cur_start = i
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if cur_start >= 0
    let tok = string.substring(input, cur_start, n)
    tokens = "#{tokens}#{tok}#{sep}"
  end

  let tlen = string.len(tokens)
  mut best_token = ""
  mut best_count = 0

  mut p = 0
  while p < tlen
    let q = next_sep(tokens, p, tlen)
    let tok = string.substring(tokens, p, q)

    mut is_first = true
    mut r = 0
    while r < p and is_first
      let s2 = next_sep(tokens, r, tlen)
      let prev = string.substring(tokens, r, s2)
      if prev == tok
        is_first = false
      end
      r = s2 + 1
    end

    if is_first
      mut cnt = 0
      mut a = 0
      while a < tlen
        let bnd = next_sep(tokens, a, tlen)
        let other = string.substring(tokens, a, bnd)
        if other == tok
          cnt = cnt + 1
        end
        a = bnd + 1
      end
      if cnt > best_count
        best_count = cnt
        best_token = tok
      end
    end

    p = q + 1
  end

  println("top=#{best_token}=#{best_count}")
end
